questions.subject: Physics
questions.question: A body of mass 2 kg is thrown upward with kinetic energy of 490 J. The height at which kinetic energy becomes half of initial value is: (Q2)
questions.explanation: Initial KE = 490 J. Half KE = 245 J. The other half (245 J) is converted to PE. mgh = 245 => 2 * 9.8 * h = 245 => 19.6 * h = 245 => h = 12.5 m.
